    Subclasses of Fraction in prog2.edu.slu
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MixedNumber
    Represents a mixed number, which is a combination of a whole number and a fraction.
    Methods in prog2.edu.slu that return Fraction
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Fraction
    MixedNumber.getFractionPart()
    Returns the fractional part of the mixed number as a Fraction object.
    Fraction
    MixedNumber.toFraction()
    Converts this mixed number to an improper fraction.

    Modifier and Type
    Method

    Adds another fraction to this fraction.

    Divides this fraction by another fraction.

    Multiplies this fraction by another fraction.
    Fraction

    Subtracts another fraction from this fraction.
